Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Substituting Linda Petersen As Successor-In-Interest To, And Substituting Successor-In-Interest For, Deceased Plaintiff; For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-09-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
The Asbestos Law & Motion calendar for September 9, 2025, is held in Dept. 206. The Honorable Rochelle C. East presiding.

No appearances, not contested, and the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFFS MARTIN PETERSEN, LINDA PETERSEN'S Motion for Order Substituting Linda Petersen as Successor-In-Interest to and Substituting Successor-In-Interest for Deceased Plaintiff, and for Leave to File First Amended Complaint is GRANTED. No opposition filed. The Court has executed Plaintiffs' proposed order.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Matter not reported. Bailiff: Not present. (304/206)
